commands.review_summary:
This PR changes plugin install planning so raw npm specs matching bundled OpenClaw plugin packages resolve to the bundled image copy, adds helper/CLI tests, and documents the Clawdock persistence boundary.

PR surface: Source +24, Tests +80, Docs +4. Total +108 across 4 files.

Reproducibility: no. local command was run because this is a read-only review, but the source path is high-confidence: current main skips bundled pre-planning for scoped npm specs, so @openclaw/discord falls through to npm. The PR body also provides clean temp-state CLI output showing the after-fix bundled path behavior.
commands.review_followup: A maintainer should decide whether the raw npm-spec compatibility change is acceptable and whether existing stale Docker install records need separate cleanup; there is no narrow ClawSweeper repair to queue from this review.

target.title: fix: keep bundled OpenClaw plugins image-owned
target.body:
## Summary
- Prefer the bundled install plan when a raw npm spec matches an OpenClaw-bundled plugin package, including scoped/versioned specs like `@openclaw/discord@2026.5.20`.
- Preserve explicit external npm overrides through the existing `npm:<spec>` escape hatch.
- Document the Docker persistence boundary: external packages and install records live in mounted state, but bundled OpenClaw channel plugins should normally load from the image-matched copy.

## Evidence From Spartacus
The Docker bot drifted because setup installed a pinned core channel package into the mounted OpenClaw home, where it shadowed the bundled plugin from newer images.

- `/Users/jason/openclaw-bots/orbstack-bot/config/logs/config-audit.jsonl:8` shows setup running `channels add --channel discord --use-env`.
- `/Users/jason/openclaw-bots/orbstack-bot/config/logs/config-audit.jsonl:9` then shows `/app/dist/index.js plugins install @openclaw/discord@2026.5.20 --pin --force`.
- `/Users/jason/openclaw-bots/orbstack-bot/config/plugins/installs.json:10-23` recorded `installRecords.discord.source = npm`, `spec = @openclaw/discord@2026.5.20`, and `installPath = /home/node/.openclaw/npm/node_modules/@openclaw/discord`.
- `/Users/jason/openclaw-bots/orbstack-bot/config/plugins/installs.json:3235-3258` shows the active Discord plugin loading from `/home/node/.openclaw/npm/node_modules/@openclaw/discord`, `origin = global`, `packageVersion = 2026.5.20`.
- `/Users/jason/openclaw-bots/orbstack-bot/config/npm/package.json:8` still pins `@openclaw/discord` to `2026.5.20` in mounted npm state.
- Current live container version check still shows the split: `app = 2026.5.26`, `managedOpenClaw = 2026.5.22`, `managedDiscord = 2026.5.20`.

That split means Docker can update the gateway image while continuing to load old core plugin code from persistent npm state, which is the isolation failure this PR prevents for future installs.

## Behavioral Proof
On this branch, the same stale install command now resolves to the bundled image copy instead of creating a managed npm override.

Command run against clean temp state:

```bash
OPENCLAW_STATE_DIR=/tmp/openclaw-core-plugin-drift.8y71dl \
OPENCLAW_CONFIG_DIR=/tmp/openclaw-core-plugin-drift.8y71dl \
OPENCLAW_CONFIG_PATH=/tmp/openclaw-core-plugin-drift.8y71dl/openclaw.json \
OPENCLAW_WORKSPACE_DIR=/tmp/openclaw-core-plugin-drift.8y71dl/workspace \
OPENCLAW_DISABLE_BONJOUR=1 \
node scripts/run-node.mjs plugins install @openclaw/discord@2026.5.20 --pin --force
```

Observed output:

```text
Using bundled plugin "discord" from ~/workspace/openclaw-docker-core-plugin-drift/dist/extensions/discord for npm install spec "@openclaw/discord@2026.5.20" because this plugin ships with the current OpenClaw build. To force an external npm override, use npm:@openclaw/discord@2026.5.20.
Installed plugin: discord
Restart the gateway to load plugins.
```

Observed install record:

```json
{
  "source": "path",
  "spec": "@openclaw/discord@2026.5.20",
  "sourcePath": "/Users/jason/workspace/openclaw-docker-core-plugin-drift/dist/extensions/discord",
  "installPath": "/Users/jason/workspace/openclaw-docker-core-plugin-drift/dist/extensions/discord"
}
```

The temp managed npm `package.json` was not created.

## Tests
- `CI=1 OPENCLAW_TEST_PROJECTS_SERIAL=1 OPENCLAW_VITEST_MAX_WORKERS=1 ~/.nvm/versions/node/v24.14.0/bin/node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run src/cli/plugin-install-plan.test.ts src/cli/plugins-cli.install.test.ts --pool=forks --maxWorkers=1 --no-file-parallelism` -> 2 files passed, 100 tests passed
- `~/.nvm/versions/node/v24.14.0/bin/corepack pnpm exec oxlint src/cli/plugin-install-plan.ts src/cli/plugin-install-plan.test.ts src/cli/plugins-cli.install.test.ts`
- `git diff --check`
- Clean-state CLI smoke above
target.author: fuller-stack-dev
